title: Pedro Opens the Way
description: On pages 13–16, this part focuses on Katakuri, Luffy, Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #15, Unknown person #16 as The crew races back to the Sunny while Big Mom’s army and the hunger rampage close in.
scene: Pedro chooses sacrifice so the crew can escape, forcing everyone to keep moving through grief.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I told you. In terms of our powers,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's nothing you can do that I can't.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: speed, power, all of it. You are inferior.

dialogue.speaker: Katakuri
dialogue.text: Like rubber would ever lose to Mochi!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: A test of power next, huh?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: A 1 billion bounty's power... absolute supremacy!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Escape storyline with 23 dialogue beats. The escape becomes a race to the Sunny, ending with Pedro’s sacrifice against Perospero.
